aeo_readiness.summary: The business has basic AEO elements in place, such as a website and contact information, but lacks significant optimizations for search engines and AI-driven search platforms.
quick_wins: Implement structured data for services and business information to improve search visibility.
Increase the number of online reviews to build trust and improve local search rankings.
Optimize website content with relevant keywords and location-based terms to enhance search engine performance.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a physical presence in St. Paul, Minnesota, and serves the Minneapolis area.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a clear local presence but lacks a strong Google Business Profile (GBP), which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on review platforms.
Insufficient local content and keywords on the website.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on its website but lacks citations on other platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
List the business on local directories and citation sites such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.

schema_gaps: Service schema for each specific service offered (e.g., Air Duct Cleaning, Chimney Cleaning).
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.
LocalBusiness schema with detailed business hours and contact information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and AI-friendly content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and AI-driven search platforms due to insufficient optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement schema markup and optimize for conversational keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Build content that establishes the business as an expert in air duct and chimney cleaning by creating blog posts, how-to guides, and video content.

page_title: Duct Cleaning Minneapolis | Ultimate Air Duct Cleaning
